title: Toward Arlong Park — Part 6
scene: On page 22, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The crew follows Nami’s trail toward the island ruled by Arlong and begins to learn how dangerous her home is.
summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
